arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Fenerbahce have now joined the race to sign Sparta Prague midfielder Ángelo Preciado. The 26-year-old has been linked with a move to Everton and Brentford as both Premier League sides look to add to their squads before transfer deadline. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss asked about transfer plans after Cheick Doucoure’s injury
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner believes that Crystal Palace have enough cover in the central midfield positions despite Cheick Doucoure’s fresh injury concern. “Against West Ham, we were lighter on numbers in midfield because of a third game in a week, but Daichi Kamada did excellently there with Will Hughes.
